config.title: OpenSpec for Agent
config.desc.views_specs_visible: Controls visibility of the Specs view in the activity bar.
config.desc.views_prompts_visible: Controls visibility of the Prompts view in the activity bar.
config.desc.views_steering_visible: Controls visibility of the Steering view in the activity bar.
config.desc.views_settings_visible: Controls visibility of the Settings view in the activity bar.
config.desc.agent_specsPath: Path where specification files are stored.
config.desc.agent_promptsPath: Path where prompt files are stored.
config.desc.aiAgent: Select which chat agent to use for sending prompts. 'claude' requires the Claude Code CLI installed.
config.desc.chatLanguage: The language GitHub Copilot should use for responses.
config.desc.customInstructions_global: Global custom instructions appended to all prompts.
config.desc.customInstructions_createSpe: Custom instructions appended when creating a spec.
config.desc.customInstructions_startAllT: Custom instructions appended when starting all tasks.
config.desc.customInstructions_archiveCh: Custom instructions appended when archiving a change.
config.desc.customInstructions_runPrompt: Custom instructions appended when running a prompt.
